description: Service worker misuse — offline cache poisoning, scope hijack, push-subscription steal

offline_cache_poison.description: Stored XSS that survives until SW is re-registered — cache.put() persists across page reloads

probes.description: If page accepts postMessage to SW and SW writes cache.put(), persistent compromise

scope_hijack.description: SW registered at /uploads/sw.js controls /uploads/* — if user uploads override SW path, attacker controls scope

probes.payload: <upload file named sw.js with valid SW content>
probes.description: Registered SW at user-controlled path hijacks parent scope
